# Single Session Coaching (SSC)

> SSC is a behaviour-change methodology that resolves the automatic leadership
> patterns diagnostics detect but programmes don't remove. One 90-minute session,
> delivered online, for a single leader or an intact team.

## What SSC does
SSC surfaces an automatic leadership pattern, decodes what it protects, and
resolves it at source — using memory-reconsolidation neuroscience and four
decades of single-session therapy research. Not managed. Not coached around.
Resolved.

## Key facts
- Format: one 90-minute session, preceded by a 20-minute scoping call.
- Pricing: single session €3,500; three-leader pilot €7,500.
- Delivery: individual sessions online; team sessions online or in person.
- Audience: CHROs, CPOs, CFOs, CEOs and senior L&D leaders.
- Company: SSC Global B.V. (KVK 42025846), operating across Europe and APAC.
